People & Knowledge Management.Tool Name: AI smart office
People & Knowledge Management.Price:
Price: 100,000 yuan (tax included)
Unit: 1 set (buyout system)
People & Knowledge Management.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
The core of this system uses AI face recognition technology, and its main operation methods are as follows:

Feature Extraction
When a person registers, the system uses an AI model to capture the key feature vectors of the face and create exclusive facial feature data.

Real-time Recognition
During the check-in process, the system analyzes the camera image in real time to determine whether it is a valid face and compares it with the existing database.

Wisdom Comparison and Judgment
The AI model can tolerate angle changes, expression differences, and light changes within a reasonable range, reducing the risk of misjudgment and missed judgment.

Automated attendance records
After the identification is successful, the system will automatically write the work/off-duty time and entry and exit records without manual input.

AI is only used for identity recognition and workflow automation, and does not involve sentiment analysis, behavioral analysis or other unnecessary personal data inferences.

Main features

This system has the following functions and features:

Production & Quality Management.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
1. Brief description of LeanPlay functions
(1) VSM parameter management: integrate BOM process and establish production parameters. (AI standard working hours prediction)
(2) Pull order scheduling simulation: pull in reverse according to the delivery date to simulate production capacity load.
(3) Kanban dispatch management: generate digital Kanban to synchronize production and logistics.
(4) Production progress tracking: Connect work report data in series to grasp the progress in real time.
(5) PDCA cycle improvement: analyze the differences between plans and actual performance to drive continuous improvement.

2. LeanPlay features
LeanPlay is a digital production management system with built-in lean management logic, specially designed for small and medium-sized enterprises in metal processing, mechanical sheet metal and discrete assembly manufacturing industries.
Applicable reasons and features:
(1) Solve the problem of small-volume and diverse scheduling: In response to the pain points of diverse production orders and lack of historical data, built-in AI standard working hours prediction uses product characteristics to automatically estimate working hours, and quickly establishes a value stream map VSM for scheduling.
(2) Lean pull eliminates waste: Different from traditional push production, LeanPlay adopts JIT pull order scheduling, pulls production in reverse according to the delivery date, and synchronizes on-site manufacturing and material movement through digital signage, effectively reducing work-in-process WIP and inventory waste.
(3) Flexibility in responding to urgent orders: Provides a simulated trial scheduling function, so production management can quickly evaluate the impact of inserted orders on existing orders and reschedule, solving the pressure of urgent order changes that foundries often face, and immediately committing to delivery.
(4) Plan-Do integration: Connect on-site work reporting, cycle through the differences between "plan" and "execution", and implement lean improvements.

3. LeanPlay application scenario
LeanPlay plays a key role in connecting "order planning (ERP)" and "on-site execution (MES/work reporting)" in manufacturing management, and is mainly responsible for production scheduling and on-site labor dispatch management. It transforms traditional push-type work order production into a digital lean pull production model based on value stream VSM. Located between enterprise resource planning (ERP) and field equipment/reporting systems, it solves the gap between "plan" and "execution (Do)".
(1) Undertake upstream (ERP): Receive ERP orders, BOM materials, and routing information, and combine AI standard working hours prediction and analysis of product characteristics to automatically estimate standard working hours and production parameters.
(2) Core processing (Scheduling): replaces traditional manual Excel scheduling, conducts capacity load analysis and pull order scheduling, and determines the production order and time of each process.
(3) Direct downstream (ShopFloor): Convert the scheduling results into "Production Instruction Kanban" and "Material Kanban" to instruct on-site personnel when to produce and when to transfer materials.
(4) Feedback cycle mechanism: Receive on-site reporting data and compare the differences between the plan and the actual situation as a basis for continuous improvement. The actual production working hours are accurately fed back to the AI ​​standard working hours prediction model, and the parameters are regularly compensated and fine-tuned and retrained to achieve an adaptive cycle improvement that becomes more accurate with more use.

4. Core industry pain points solved by LeanPlay
(1) Order scheduling is time-consuming and difficult to promise delivery: Traditionally, manual or Excel scheduling is relied upon, which requires multiple constraints to be considered. The information is complex and time-consuming, and it is difficult for production management to accurately grasp production capacity and respond to customer delivery dates immediately.
(2) Insufficient flexibility in responding to urgent orders: In the face of urgent orders or changing demands, the traditional model is difficult to quickly reschedule and evaluate the impact on existing orders.
(3) Push-type production leads to inventory waste: In order to increase the utilization rate, traditional push-type production can easily lead to overproduction in the front process, resulting in a large accumulation of on-site line-side inventory WIP and a backlog of funds.
(4) Information gap between planning and execution: There is often a gap between ERP planning and on-site execution.
(5) Lack of historical data leads to inaccurate scheduling: New products often need to be produced in a small number of diverse models. Relying on manual rough estimation of standard working hours has large errors, which can easily lead to output gaps, delivery delays or cost distortions.
(6) Manual maintenance parameters are time-consuming and difficult to optimize: constructing VSM requires accurate production parameters, which are difficult to maintain and correct manually for a long time; there is a lack of an intelligent mechanism that can automatically predict product characteristics and perform adaptive cyclic corrections based on actual on-site work reports.

Energy & Carbon Management.Tool Name: Carbon Mate AI smart carbon management and carbon inventory platform
Energy & Carbon Management.Price:
Price: 100,000 yuan
Unit: 18 months
Energy & Carbon Management.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
Carbon Mate is an enterprise carbon management and carbon inventory SaaS platform that combines artificial intelligence and automated data processing technology to help enterprises establish a complete carbon emission data management mechanism. The platform uses digital and automated tools to help enterprises complete carbon inventory data collection, emission coefficient management and carbon emission calculations, reducing the labor cost of carbon inventory operations and improving operational efficiency.
 Core functions
Carbon Mate provides a complete carbon management system function, including activity data management, emission coefficient management, carbon emission calculation and inventory data management. Enterprises can establish emission source and activity data management methods based on organizational boundaries, and centrally manage various emission source data through the platform.
The platform can automatically recommend applicable emission coefficients based on emission sources, and automatically complete carbon emission calculations and data aggregation, reducing manual search for coefficients and calculations, making carbon emission data consistent and traceable, and assisting enterprises in establishing a complete carbon emission database.
 AI core capabilities
Carbon Mate has introduced a number of AI-assisted automation functions to help companies reduce the workload of collecting and organizing carbon inventory data.
The platform provides an electricity bill AI document recognition function, which combines Google Document AI's OCR, layout analysis and object recognition capabilities to automatically identify the content of energy bill documents such as electricity bills, capture electricity usage and related activity data, and create inventory records, reducing manual input and data collection time.
The system also provides an AI emission coefficient recommendation function. It uses a large language model (LLM) combined with RPA automated processes to intelligently recommend applicable emission coefficients based on emission sources and activity data. It can also automatically organize relevant supporting data and associated inventories to assist users in completing carbon emission calculations and inventory data preparation.
In addition, the platform integrates a number of automated data collection tools, such as the intelligent traffic distance query function, which automatically obtains screenshots of distances and routes from start and end locations through the Google Maps API and writes them into emission source records; and the multi-source data automatic acquisition function, which can automatically obtain high-frequency emission source activity data such as aviation (ICAO passengers/cargo), shipping (VesselFinder) and energy data sources. Through the integration of AI and automation technology, Carbon Mate can effectively reduce the labor and time costs required for carbon inventory data collection, emission coefficient search and emission calculation.
 Supports standards and inventory modules
Carbon Mate supports ISO 14064-1 and GHG Protocol greenhouse gas inventory frameworks. Enterprises can establish emission source and activity data management methods based on organizational boundaries, and centrally manage emission source data through the system.
In response to the carbon inventory needs of Taiwanese enterprises, the platform provides the Ministry of Environment module, which is designed in accordance with the greenhouse gas inventory guidelines of the Taiwan Ministry of Environment and integrates the greenhouse gas emission coefficient database announced by the government. Enterprises can establish emission source and activity data records based on the inventory guidelines, and the system can automatically recommend applicable emission coefficients based on emission sources and complete carbon emission calculations and data collection, significantly reducing the burden of carbon inventory operations.
In terms of product-level carbon management, Carbon Mate also supports ISO 14067 product carbon footprint management. The platform establishes a product carbon footprint management process based on the LCA (Life Cycle Assessment) life cycle assessment framework. Companies can establish product life cycle related activity data, such as raw material acquisition, manufacturing stages, transportation and distribution and other life cycle emission sources, and complete product carbon footprint calculation and management through the system. The system can also set life cycle boundaries according to different product inventory requirements, such as Cradle-to-Gate or Cradle-to-Grave.
 System integration capabilities
Carbon Mate supports integration with existing enterprise systems, such as ERP systems or energy management systems. Enterprises can import existing operational data into the platform to establish a carbon emission data database, and centrally manage emission source activity data through the system. The platform also provides carbon emission data viewing and analysis functions to help companies understand the activity data and carbon emissions of each emission source.
 Information security and verification guarantee
While Carbon Mate introduces AI and automation technology, it also attaches great importance to corporate data security and the credibility of inventory data. The platform has obtained the Verification Protocol Program Approval (AUP) issued by the international authoritative organization SGS to ensure that the carbon inventory data processing process is verifiable and professionally credible.
In addition, the Carbon Mate platform also complies with ISO/IEC 27001 Information Security Management System (ISMS) certification, ensuring that the system complies with international information security standards in terms of data access control, data protection and information security management. Through a complete information security management mechanism, companies can use the platform with confidence to conduct carbon inventory and carbon data management, ensuring that company operating data and carbon emission data are properly protected.

Through AI intelligent tools, automated data processing and a complete information security management mechanism, Carbon Mate helps companies efficiently complete carbon inventory and carbon management operations while ensuring data security.

Energy & Carbon Management.Tool Name: AI circular carbon sustainable value chain and kind manager Yun Guanjia
Energy & Carbon Management.Price: Price: 120,000 yuan (basic model) Unit: 1 set 12 months (subscription) Remarks: At least 1 year Other versions or customized prices are negotiable
Energy & Carbon Management.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
When most companies promote carbon management, they often face serious challenges such as "data fragmentation", "difficulties in Scope 3 inspections" and "greenwashing risks". Shengwang Technology has created "AI circular carbon sustainable value chain and kind manager cloud steward" specifically for this pain point. We are not only a set of tools to help you produce carbon data reports, but also the only carbon management brain on the market that deeply integrates "Due Diligence" with AI technology.

We know very well that what enterprises need is not the most expensive system, but a tool that can "really solve problems" and "stand the test." This system helps you use mid-level budgets and enjoy group-level carbon management firepower. It not only significantly reduces compliance costs, but also converts production waste and carbon reduction data into ESG assets with commercial value.

[Core functions and exclusive features]

1. Original "good manager" four-level protection mechanism (to eliminate greenwashing and evidence risks)
In response to strict international requirements for the authenticity of ESG data, we apply AI to implement the company's "good steward" responsibility, providing complete L1 to L4 digital protection, so that your carbon data has the highest legal credibility:

Level 1 True capture at the source: Through digital ID/QR-CODE and on-site image storage (Photo Evidence), it is ensured that the data is truly recorded as soon as it occurs.

Level 2 transmission anti-tampering protection: Combined with GPS positioning, automatic return of transportation distance, and exclusive patented anti-tampering technology (Anti-Tamper), it ensures absolute security during data transmission and storage.

Level 3 dynamic abnormality warning: AI automated dynamic calculation is combined with weight difference warning (Weight Alert). When supplier or production line data is abnormal, the system actively intercepts and reports, fulfilling management and supervision responsibilities.

Level 4 complete compliance evidence: Instantly produce recycled product recycling material proportion certificates and carbon records that meet international standards, provide a complete audit trail, and are not afraid of strict scrutiny from brand customers and third-party verification agencies.

2. Breakthrough "Category 3" supply chain penetration management (eliminating 90% of manual sorting time)
Category 3 (carbon emissions from upstream and downstream supply chains) is the most difficult data for companies to obtain. The system is built with industry-leading AI optical recognition (OCR) and NLP semantic analysis technology, and logistics links can be automatically created and classified in a single click. Used with standard APIs to seamlessly connect existing ERP and attendance systems (can be customized), it can automate complex area three inventories, accurately track the whereabouts of scraps and waste, and completely solve the difficulty of manual recording.

3. Lightweight equipment energy consumption monitoring (plug and play, accurately catch power-hungry monsters) (customized)
Breaking through the limitations of traditional software, it supports the combination of lightweight IoT modules (such as smart meters, spectrometers, smart scales, etc.). Assist enterprises to manage energy consumption from the extensive "factory level" to the precise "equipment level", and accurately calculate the carbon footprint of unit products.

4. Patented technology and high-standard security protection
The system development follows international information security standards and has multiple data traceability and anti-tampering patents. We ensure that the company's business secrets, supplier lists and carbon reduction data are operated in a high-security environment with anti-hacker levels to provide the most secure SaaS services.

5. Automatically generate compliance reports with one click
The system supports one-click export of Excel/PDF statistical reports and carbon data reports, and automatically connects the bottom-level data collection to the top-level report output, saving inventory consulting fees and internal communication costs.

[Applicable situations]

Supply chain manufacturers facing pressure from brand customers to reduce carbon emissions: There is an urgent need to check "Category 3" data and provide key suppliers with high-level "good managers" compliance and anti-tampering certificates.

Manufacturing industries preparing to promote low-carbon transformation: It is necessary to solve the problem of traditional factories that are difficult to track production waste (leftovers), cannot accurately control machine energy consumption, and face manpower shortages.

Multi-site chain service industry: Enterprises that need to integrate power and material data across regions, pursue the value of operational data, and reduce the impact of carbon fees.

Manufacturers with urgent compliance needs: Covering medical, cleaning, construction, etc. industries that are prone to heavy fines due to improper outsourcing of waste processing. Through the mechanism of this solution, we combine on-site images and GPS to truly capture data from the source and prevent tampering, creating a legally credible digital evidence chain for you, perfectly cutting off the blame for violations, and easily responding to the audits of the competent authorities.

(8) Principal component/factor analysis
(9) Variable selection, automatic modeling and model comparison

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: AIIA Artificial Intelligence Decision Analysis System Enterprise Edition (100 models, one-year subscription)
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
This product is an automated machine learning system. The difference between the professional version and the enterprise version lies in the number of models required by the purchasing unit. The professional version is suitable for less than 50 models, and the enterprise version is suitable for more than 100 models.
This item provides the purchasing unit with a one-year right to use a group of 100 machine learning models. The purchasing unit can obtain the latest version issued by the company within one year.
This system provides EDA data analysis, root cause analysis, automated machine learning, parameter optimization, and machine learning model deployment and management.
The main functions of the system include:
1. Provide EDA to automatically generate statistical summaries, variable relationship diagrams, outlier detection and data distribution analysis.
2. Data preprocessing can support missing value processing, field type conversion, automatic standardization and coding.
3. Can be directly connected to the AVEVA PI System to regularly import time series sensing data for analysis.
4. Classification, regression and other models can be automatically selected for training and model comparison can be performed.
5. Built-in root cause analysis model can explore the root causes of abnormal quality or low performance.
6. Combine machine learning models and optimization algorithms to reversely deduce the optimal combination of production parameters to improve efficiency or reduce energy consumption.
7. The trained model can be deployed into a RESTful API to provide instant prediction services.
8. Can track the version, training parameters and performance indicators of each model, and support performance degradation monitoring.
9. One-click deployment process, quickly put the model online on the server or edge device through the graphical interface or automatic process.

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: MARS Multivariable Anomaly Detection System Enterprise Edition (100 models, one-year subscription)
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
This product is a predictive maintenance system. The difference between the professional version and the enterprise version lies in the number of production line equipment purchased per unit. Small-scale production lines (the number of equipment is less than 10 units) is suitable for the professional version, and large-scale production lines (the number of equipment is more than 10 units) is suitable for the enterprise version.
This item provides the purchasing unit with a one-year right to use a group of 100 anomaly detection models. The purchasing unit can obtain the latest version issued by the company within one year.
This system provides equipment operation monitoring functions, abnormal correlation factor suggestions, modeling data cleaning, and equipment abnormality early warning notification functions.
The main functions of the system include:
1. Provides a simple and easy-to-use interface to facilitate users to import modeling data.
2. Provide interactive online data cleaning function.
3. Provides the function of connecting to the PI real-time database, which can quickly capture data to build equipment models and monitor equipment operation in real time.
4. Provide one-click model deployment function so that the model can be quickly put into use.
5. Calculate health indicators for device monitoring.
6. Provide abnormal related measurement point sorting as a reference for user equipment inspection.
7. When the system detects deviations in the operation of the equipment, it can notify the maintenance department to conduct maintenance in advance to avoid the loss of downtime without warning.
8. Provide a fault knowledge base that can integrate fault patterns and SOPs, establish standardized response guidelines, and improve the handling efficiency and experience inheritance of front-line personnel.

This system provides equipment operation monitoring functions, abnormal correlation factor suggestions, modeling data cleaning, and equipment abnormality early warning notification functions.
The main functions of the system include:
1. Provides a simple and easy-to-use interface to facilitate users to import modeling data.
2. Provide interactive online data cleaning function.
3. Provides the function of connecting to the PI real-time database, which can quickly capture data to build equipment models and monitor equipment operation in real time.
4. Provide one-click model deployment function so that the model can be quickly put into use.
5. Calculate health indicators for device monitoring.
6. Provide abnormal related measurement point sorting as a reference for user equipment inspection.
7. When the system detects deviations in the operation of the equipment, it can notify the maintenance department to conduct maintenance in advance to avoid the loss of downtime without warning.
8. Provide a fault knowledge base that can integrate fault patterns and SOPs, establish standardized response guidelines, and improve the handling efficiency and experience inheritance of front-line personnel.

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: InfoMiner intelligent public opinion analysis system (covering community and online news) (1-month license, 15 keyword groups/topics, unlimited keyword modifications)
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use: The InfoMiner intelligent public opinion analysis system comprehensively collects more than 500,000 public opinion sources at home and abroad: including online news, Facebook (fan groups, societies), PTT, popular forums, etc.). Through big data and artificial intelligence analysis, important information can be extracted immediately and quickly from public opinion big data, allowing public departments to immediately grasp the pulse of public opinion events related to themselves, and then turn public opinion crises into opportunities.

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: Intelligent Line Public Opinion Secretary (automatic summary of news and public relations response suggestions)
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use: Simple operation through Line interface improves the efficiency of news analysis and public relations response. When a user sends a news link, the system automatically provides two options: a summary of the news and a tone option that includes PR advice. The news summary function uses natural language processing technology to quickly extract key points, and PR response suggestions generate professional responses based on news content and tone.

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: TV news ticker monitoring and Line reporting service ((1-month license)
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
1． Intelligent real-time observation of TV news stations through AI (including Taiwan TV, China Television, China Television, Public Television, One TV News, Times News, Dongsen News, Zhongtian News, FTV News, Sanli News, TVBS News, Dongsen Financial News, Feifan News)
2. Users can specify keywords to check the news and TV broadcast tickers through the system, and can be notified to the user's mobile phone through LINE (notified once every 30 minutes after the report), allowing users to grasp the TV broadcast content in the shortest possible time.
3. Daily reports can be sent to the agency's designated email every day via MAIL.

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: PrimeHub MLOps Deep Learning AI Development and Deployment Platform Enterprise Cluster Edition Renewal (One Year)

PrimeHub MLOps is an AI/ML collaborative development platform built for the sharing needs of multiple people and multiple projects. Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: AI deep learning image people and traffic flow calculation (4 channels)
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
ioNetworks AI imaging technology uses deep learning image analysis technology. All models are self-built, so the accuracy will be higher and the false alarm rate lower than similar applications on the market that use open source models and computer vision imaging technology.
When a vehicle appears within the recognition range, the number of people and trains in the set area can be calculated.

Identification conditions:
Fisheye camera: width should be greater than 200 Pixels in the frame
Gun camera: Width should be greater than 100 Pixels in frame
The masking degree of an object must not exceed 30% of the object
Camera environment, installation height is 4.5 to 6 meters
Identification range: less than three lanes for a single camera

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: AI video editing platform
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
1. Through a one-stop platform covering full-connected services from video uploading, management, processing, playback, analysis to distribution, it helps enterprises transform from graphics and text to audio-visual applications.
2. The functions cover the audio and video life cycle, from video shooting, editing, uploading (supporting SDK/API/console and URL import) to media management (transcoding, classification, image quality optimization, AI subtitles/watermarking), and equipped with a smart playback monitoring and data analysis platform that can track QoS (Quality of Service) and QoE (User Experience) indicators in real time.
3. The product supports zero-frame start-up, low lag, energy-saving optimization, and waterfall streaming interactive interface. It also supports generative AI functions such as smart video translation, voice reproduction, facial fusion and background replacement.
4. Provide content security mechanisms and integrate multiple encryption protocols (such as DRM, self-developed encryption, HLS) to prevent bandwidth theft, illegal recording, and illegal rebroadcasting, ensuring the security of UGC content; and supporting global CDN acceleration and node deployment to ensure the stability and legal compliance of content playback.
5. Provide complete open source code (including GitHub resources and Demo) to quickly build your own applications.
6. Supports AI editing, image quality enhancement, sound reproduction, smart subtitles and multi-lingual translation.
7. Provides detailed QoS/QoE analysis and single-point tracing, and has built-in DRM and watermark technology to prevent bandwidth theft to ensure that UGC and commercial content are not used illegally.
8. Configure 3000+ nodes and 180T bandwidth to provide CDN network and regulatory compliance support.

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: KEYPO AI robot
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use: An AI intelligent assistant platform specially built for commercial use, combined with multiple language models (supporting OpenAI GPT-4o, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude 3.5, etc.), to help build intelligent dialogue systems, knowledge management, customer service automation and semantic analysis. Users can import a dedicated knowledge base according to their needs, quickly upload frequently asked questions or customized quotations in batches, and set AI response logic, including traditional responses, semantic expansion, and multi-stage Q&A. Provides robot role management, customer service personnel takeover transfer mechanism, cross-language support (such as Chinese knowledge base automatically corresponding to Thai responses), emotion detection and response evaluation mechanism. In addition, the platform also has a UIUX editing interface that supports information presentation methods such as tables and hyperlinks.

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: Moon Computerized Tomography Image Processing Software Server License
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
1. MAIA Lung CT mainly identifies pulmonary nodules with a size of 6 mm or more, including but not limited to solid, non-solid, and ground glass samples. Using this software can reduce omission errors and provide doctors with a reference for interpreting computed tomography images.
2. Clinical verification shows that the sensitivity is 87% and the specificity is 98%, and the location of pulmonary nodules can be accurately marked.
3. Through the two key technologies of Lung Segmentaiton and U-NET, lung segmentation and nodule identification are achieved.
4. Because Nodule is three-dimensional, the model is trained using the 2.5D method of front and back expansion to reduce misjudgments.
5. Software server authorization

Integrated & Other Solutions.Price:

Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
The core of this system uses AI face recognition technology, and its main operation methods are as follows:

Feature Extraction
When a person registers, the system uses an AI model to capture the key feature vectors of the face and create exclusive facial feature data.

Real-time Recognition
During the check-in process, the system analyzes the camera image in real time to determine whether it is a valid face and compares it with the existing database.

Wisdom Comparison and Judgment
The AI model can tolerate angle changes, expression differences, and light changes within a reasonable range, reducing the risk of misjudgment and missed judgment.

Automated attendance records
After the identification is successful, the system will automatically write the work/off-duty time and entry and exit records without manual input.

AI is only used for identity recognition and workflow automation, and does not involve sentiment analysis, behavioral analysis or other unnecessary personal data inferences.

Main features

This system has the following functions and features:

Contactless check-in: No need to swipe cards, fingerprints or passwords, reducing device contact and check-in behavior.

Real-time identification and display: If the identification is successful, the person's name and time will be displayed to facilitate on-site instant confirmation.

Automatic attendance management: The system automatically determines daily work (in) and work (out) records to reduce manual work.

Occupancy inquiry and report export: Support inquiry by person, date, month, and export to CSV/Excel.

Flexible deployment: Can be used with USB cameras or IP cameras (RTSP), suitable for different fields.

Permission hierarchical management: distinguish the operation permissions of administrators, personnel personnel and general users according to roles.
This system is suitable for the following situations:

SMEs and corporate offices
Carry out clock-in management for employees at fixed entrances and exits.

Factory, campus or controlled area
Combining entry and exit management with attendance records to ensure that personnel entry and exit can be tracked.

Counter/Personnel centralized management area
Personnel registration, inquiry and report management are carried out by HR or counter staff.

Units that need to improve their attendance accuracy
Reduce the management costs of punching in on behalf of others, forgetting to punch in, and manual make-up.

Conclusion: RPA not only solves the challenges of labor shortage and rising labor costs, but also strengthens smart factory data connection and machine automation. Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Name: SAI-A, EMS-AI
Integrated & Other Solutions.Price:
Price: SAI-A is RMB 150,000 (buyout), and EMS-AI can be purchased for an additional RMB 30,000 (buyout).
SAI-A+EMS-AI: 80,000/year (excluding tax) (subscription)
Integrated & Other Solutions.Tool Overview (Functions, Features, Use:
1. System features
• Powerful expansion capabilities (MCP integration): Through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), the AI agent can seamlessly connect to external resources and applications, such as PostgreSQL database query, Google Drive file reading or email sending, greatly exceeding the limitations of plain text Q&A.
• Intelligent multi-format knowledge base: supports unstructured documents (PDF, DOCX, etc.), structured data (Excel, CSV) and even image uploads. The system can also use LLM to automatically parse structured data and generate field descriptions to optimize search accuracy.
• Highly customizable AI agent: AI agents can be tailored for different tasks, customize character prompt words, tone, model temperature (randomness) and dialogue memory length, and support one-click connection to external channels such as LINE or API.
• Enterprise-level permissions and group isolation mechanism: Provides a three-tier structure of domain administrators, group administrators and general users, with detailed permission settings (view, settings, management), and ensures that data and resources between different groups are isolated from each other.
• Data-driven optimization feedback: Built-in visual dashboard and dialogue feedback system to help managers understand user satisfaction and hot issues in real time, and continuously iterate AI service quality.
2. Core functions
• Chatbot (AI Agent) management:
o Customizable welcome messages and default "quick chat buttons" can be set to guide users.
o Precisely control model behavior and context memory length, and bind agents to specific knowledge bases and MCP external tools.
o Provides conversation record export and external channel conversation record viewing functions.
• Knowledge Base management:
o Supports uploading files and scheduling processing, and provides two search strategies: "Atomic" and "Standard" to adapt to text of different lengths.
o Built-in "Test Search" tool, administrators can set the maximum number of results and the minimum similarity score threshold to dynamically test and ensure the accuracy of AI search.
• MCP tool management:
o Supports connecting to external servers through STDIO or SSE communication protocols, and the system will automatically detect the tool list provided by the server.
o Provide a test interface to verify tool parameters and execution results. Once confirmed, they can be opened to designated Agents.
• Dashboard and feedback analysis:
o Core indicator monitoring: Track the total number of conversations in the system, the number of active robots, the number of knowledge base files processed, and overall user satisfaction.
o Activities and Trends: Real-time display of the latest conversations, uploads, and Agent update events, and the integration of this week's "Hot Questions" rankings and the Agents responsible for answering them.
o Conversation feedback management: Centrally collect users' "positive" and "negative" reviews, which can be filtered and viewed based on the Agent name and time range (such as today, this week, this month).
• User and permission management:
o Support strict password security specifications (required to contain uppercase and lowercase English letters, numbers and special characters).
o Provide fine-grained resource permission allocation, for example, allowing a user to only have "View" permissions on Agent A, but have "Setting" permissions on Agent B.
3. Application Scenario
1. Enterprise internal knowledge and regulations retrieval assistant: Enterprises can upload internal regulations and operation manuals (PDF/Word) to the knowledge base, and create exclusive internal Agents. Combined with the group isolation function of "User Management", it can ensure that the data of the R&D department and the human resources department are independent, and employees can only query the knowledge base content of their respective groups.
2. Automated database query and task execution (combined with MCP): Through the MCP tool, the Agent can be transformed into an automated assistant. For example, if a user asks for information about a specific customer in a conversation, the Agent can directly call the database through the MCP to perform a query, or read files in Google Drive to answer questions, or even trigger a command to send an email.
3. Multi-channel smart customer service center (LINE/API integration): Merchants can create an Agent that mounts the product knowledge base, and fill in information such as Channel Access Token in the "external channel" to quickly deploy AI to the official LINE account. At the same time, a "quick chat button" can be set up to allow consumers to click to inquire about frequently asked questions.
4. Service quality monitoring and pain point analysis: Managers can view high-frequency "hot issues" through the "dashboard" every week to understand the issues that customers are most concerned about recently (such as return policies, out-of-stock of specific products, etc.). Combined with "Conversation Feedback Management" to filter out recent "bad reviews", quickly locate situations where the AI ​​answers poorly, and then optimize the content of the knowledge base or adjust the Agent's role prompt words.
